title: Operating Culture
description: Neuroartan culture is shaped by product truth, governed execution, and long-horizon institutional seriousness.

principles.title: Governed systems over improvisation
principles.summary: Important work is structured through stable ownership, reviewable systems, and traceable decisions.

principles.title: Continuity over novelty theater
principles.summary: The product is designed for durable reflection, memory, and identity fidelity rather than short-lived AI spectacle.

principles.title: Product truth before polish claims
principles.summary: Public behavior, language, and shipping decisions must remain aligned with what the product can defensibly support.

principles.title: Privacy and permission are product architecture
principles.summary: Profile, source-ingestion, and public-route work are handled as trust-sensitive systems rather than cosmetic settings.

principles.title: Institutional clarity
principles.summary: The standard is serious, quiet, and enterprise-ready across UI, code, and public communication.
